# MomentBook

> A quiet archive for travel moments. The web explains the app and shows published journeys, moments, photos, and profiles as read-only pages.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://momentbook.app/en): Product intro, app download, and FAQ sections
- [Journeys](https://momentbook.app/en/journeys): Examples of published journeys (public content)
- [Users](https://momentbook.app/en/users): Public profiles and published journey lists

## Product Principles

- One post-trip flow: upload photos in batch, then revisit them by timeline and map
- Photos are organized by date and time, with manual cleanup available when needed
- Private by default; publishing is optional and creates a unique public page
- The web is read-only; it does not recreate app authoring or editing flows
- No social features: no feeds, likes, or rankings

## Technical Info

- **Mobile apps**: iOS 15.1 or later, Android 7.0 or later
- **Web**: Read-only public content (journeys, photos, user profiles)
- **Languages**: English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, Portuguese, French, Thai, Vietnamese (9 languages supported)
- **Architecture**: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 18, TypeScript, route-level revalidation

## Policies & Support

- [Privacy Policy](https://momentbook.app/en/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://momentbook.app/en/terms)
- [Community Guidelines](https://momentbook.app/en/community-guidelines)
- [Support](https://momentbook.app/en/support): support@momentbook.app

## What MomentBook Is Not

MomentBook is not a social network, productivity tool, habit tracker, or ranking system. It doesn't have feeds, likes, rankings, or web publishing flows beyond read-only access to already published content.
